## Dependency Graph

*Derived from: `packages/*/package.json` + `scripts/shared/package-registry.mjs`*

### Layer Dependency Graph

```
L0  @brandos/contracts
 └─ L1  @brandos/shared-utils
      └─ L2  @brandos/auth
           ├─ L3a @brandos/runtime-config       → contracts
           ├─ L3a @brandos/governance-config    → contracts (re-exports STRUCTURAL_CONSTRAINTS)
           ├─ L3a @brandos/artifact-config      → (no @brandos deps)
           ├─ L3a @brandos/ui-admin             → (no @brandos deps)
           ├─ L3b @brandos/ai-runtime-layer     → contracts, shared-utils
           ├─ L3b @brandos/output-control-layer → contracts, shared-utils (NOT governance-config)
           ├─ L4  @brandos/governance-layer     → contracts, governance-config, shared-utils
           ├─ L4  @brandos/iskill-runtime       → contracts, governance-config, shared-utils
           ├─ L5  @brandos/artifact-engine-layer → contracts, output-control-layer, governance-layer
           ├─ L6  @brandos/brand-intelligence   → contracts
           ├─ L7  @brandos/control-plane-layer  → ALL L0–L6
           └─ L8  @brandos/presentation-layer   → contracts, shared-utils (NOT auth)
L9  apps/web → ALL packages (BI via CPL proxy only)
```

### Topological Build Order

```
 1. @brandos/contracts
 2. @brandos/shared-utils
 3. @brandos/auth
 4. @brandos/runtime-config

```

## Architectural Rules

*Derived from: `check-boundaries.mjs`, `check-route-boundaries.mjs`, `package-registry.mjs`*

### `RULE-LAYER-ORDER`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs (main loop) + LAYER_TIERS

No package may import from a package at a higher layer index than its own.

> Enforced in CI via `node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs`. Violations exit(1).

### `RULE-SAME-LEVEL-PEERS`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs + ALLOWED_SAME_LEVEL_PAIRS

Peer imports at the same layer index are forbidden unless the pair appears in ALLOWED_SAME_LEVEL_PAIRS.

> Allowed pairs: @brandos/governance-layer→@brandos/iskill-runtime | @brandos/iskill-runtime→@brandos/governance-layer

### `RULE-1 — apps/web BI isolation`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkWebBiWriteRule() + monorepo Rule 8

`apps/web` must NOT import `@brandos/brand-intelligence` directly. All BI access routes through CPL proxy functions.

> CPL proxies: getBrandMemory(), recordBrandMemoryObservation(), reviewBrandMemorySignal(), resolveBrandCognitionContext(), getBrandSummary()

### `RULE-2 — OCL BI isolation`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkOclBiRule()

`@brandos/output-control-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/brand-intelligence`.

> OCL receives all brand data via ResolvedGenerationContract. No direct BI import permitted.

### `RULE-3 — CPL BI symbol allowlist`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkCplBiRule() + CPL_BI_ALLOWED_SYMBOLS

`@brandos/control-plane-layer` may only import specific symbols from `@brandos/brand-intelligence`.

> Allowed: getGlobalBrandIntelligenceRuntime, initBrandIntelligenceRuntime, IBrandCognitionRuntime, IBrandIntelligenceRuntime, BrandIntelligenceConfig, BrandIntelligenceResolution, createDegradedCognitionContext, createBrandSignalRepository

### `RULE-4 — ARL ↛ OCL (Fix C1)`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkArlOclRule()

`@brandos/ai-runtime-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/output-control-layer`.

> ARL is a domain-agnostic runtime kernel. Artifact prompts delivered via registerArtifactPrompt() through globalThis.__brandos_runtime_adapter bridge.

### `RULE-5 — GL ↛ OCL (Fix C2)`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkGlOclRule()

`@brandos/governance-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/output-control-layer`.

> repairJSON / extractJSON moved to @brandos/shared-utils. Import from there.

### `RULE-6 — CPL ↛ concrete BI repos (Fix C4)`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkCplBiRepositoryRule()

`@brandos/control-plane-layer` must NOT import concrete BI repository classes.

> Forbidden: SupabaseBrandSignalRepository, SupabaseBrandMemoryRepository, InMemoryBrandMemoryRepository. Use createBrandSignalRepository() factory instead.

### `RULE-7 — CPL ↛ concrete BIRuntime class (Fix C3)`
**Source:** check-boundaries.mjs checkCplBiConcreteClassRule()

`@brandos/control-plane-layer` must NOT import BrandIntelligenceRuntime concrete class as a value.

> Use createDegradedCognitionContext() standalone export instead.

### `RULE-OCL-GOVERNANCE-CONFIG`
**Source:** monorepo Rule 7 + WS2 + OCL dependencyBoundary.test.ts

`@brandos/output-control-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/governance-config`.

> Structural constraints now sourced directly from @brandos/contracts (Cleanup Sprint 2 WS2). Enforced by tests/boundary/dependencyBoundary.test.ts inside OCL.

### `RULE-PL-AUTH-ISOLATION`
**Source:** monorepo Rule 9 + WS1 + PL dependencyBoundary.test.ts

`@brandos/presentation-layer` must NOT re-export `@brandos/auth` symbols from src/index.ts.

> Auth state injected via PLAuthProvider/PLAuthContext. Consumers import directly from @brandos/auth.

### `RULE-ROUTE-BOUNDARY`
**Source:** check-route-boundaries.mjs + FORBIDDEN_IN_ROUTES

Next.js route files in apps/web/app/api/ must NOT import runtime layers directly.

> Forbidden in routes: @brandos/governance-layer, @brandos/ai-runtime-layer, @brandos/output-control-layer, @brandos/artifact-engine-layer, @brandos/iskill-runtime, @brandos/brand-intelligence

### `RULE-ADMIN-AUTH`
**Source:** monorepo Rule 12

Every /api/admin/* route must call requireAdmin() before any logic.

### `RULE-NODEJS-RUNTIME`
**Source:** monorepo Rule 13

Next.js route files that touch CPL must export `const runtime = "nodejs"`.

### `RULE-ARTIFACT-ENGINE-NO-TOUCH`
**Source:** monorepo Rule 11

`engine.ts` and `registry.ts` inside @brandos/artifact-engine-layer are read-only for agents.

> These are hard no-touch zones. Modifications require explicit human approval.
